name: Underworld Ascension Method

effects: Divided into 9 layers, uses extreme-Yin sites for near-death cultivation to form Cold Dan

Eventually superseded by Celestial/Ancient Order cultivation but remains early-game engine

Requires Vermilion Bird Sequence to fully unlock

name: Nine Cycle Celestial Refining Tactic

effects: Causes immortal power to spiral in the body before release, equivalent to Golden Immortal power
Up to 9 revolutions; longer charge = greater output
Stacks with Rapid Spell Art; foundational to late-game Empyrean Exalt reproduction
knownFacts: Uses immortal/celestial power; requires Soul Transformation and up

Learned as part of Celestial Cultivation induction under All-Seer/Tianyunzi

name: Ancient God Tactic

effects: Reconstructs the cultivator's body as an Ancient God; outer-body cultivation track
